recipes.title: Sign a payload & get a recall receipt
recipes.summary: Wrap any JSON payload in a DSSE envelope (HMAC-SHA-256) and return a signed receipt Rosie can replay later.

recipes.title: Recall a past conversation or note
recipes.summary: Cosine recall over Rosie's provenanced memory; returns the best match with a signed recall receipt.

recipes.title: Screen user input for prompt injection
recipes.summary: Run input through the Sentra immune filter before dispatch; block/warn/allow with reasons + receipt.

recipes.title: Run the 13-axis Yuyay decision gate
recipes.summary: Evaluate an action against the 13-axis Yuyay gate (Λ aggregator) before Rosie commits to it.

recipes.title: Cite a thesis chapter with SHA
recipes.summary: Pull chapter content from an ingested thesis plus its PDF SHA-256 and a signed recall receipt.

recipes.title: Look up a Lean theorem's type signature
recipes.summary: Substring-search the 870-declaration Lean index; returns name, kind, status (PROVEN/SORRY/AXIOM), file, signature.

recipes.title: Run the Warhacker demo
recipes.summary: Execute the Warhacker readiness demo (k3d + uds-cli + Pepr DSSE) — San Diego June 16-19 2026, readiness 6/6 GREEN.

recipes.title: Adapt a response mobile-first
recipes.summary: Format Rosie's answer per SZL_MOBILE_FIRST_STANDARD.md — short blocks, thumb-reachable actions.

recipes.title: Replay yesterday's decisions
recipes.summary: Event-sourced AYNI replay of a day's signed decisions for self-reflection / audit.

recipes.title: Verify a DSSE envelope
recipes.summary: Validate an HMAC-SHA-256 DSSE envelope from amaru/sentra/rosie against the public-key fingerprint.

recipes.title: Look up a Codex formula
recipes.summary: Fetch one of the 23 Codex-Kernel formula descriptors (5 Lean-proven, 18 open conjecture).

recipes.title: Dispatch a Hatun-MCP tool
recipes.summary: Call one of the 16 Hatun-MCP tools via the tool mesh, with a signed call receipt.

recipes.title: Ingest a document into memory (WAYRA)
recipes.summary: Push a document through WAYRA ingest so Rosie can recall + cite it later with a SHA.

recipes.title: Export a Body-of-Evidence bundle
recipes.summary: Produce a signed Body-of-Evidence (BoE) bundle of receipts for an audit or a customer.

recipes.title: Promote Rosie as a11oy's understudy
recipes.summary: Health-check a11oy and, on failure, promote Rosie to serve the same routes (failover understudy).

recipes.title: Route a prompt across the 7-tier open stack
recipes.summary: Send a prompt through Rosie's 7-tier LLM router (Llama/Qwen/DeepSeek/Mistral/Gemma/Phi/Yi + more).

recipes.title: Answer with agentic RAG
recipes.summary: Run agentic retrieval-augmented generation over Rosie's provenanced corpus, citing sources.

recipes.title: Honor a GDPR erasure request
recipes.summary: Erase a user's memory entries and emit a signed deletion receipt (right-to-be-forgotten).

recipes.title: Sign a voice transcript
recipes.summary: Transcribe speech (STT) and sign the transcript so the spoken record is provenanced.

recipes.title: Advise on calendar / email (aide vertical)
recipes.summary: Read connected M365 calendar/email (advisory only) and propose actions Rosie can sign before sending.

recipes.title: Check Doctrine v11 constants at runtime
recipes.summary: Return the locked Doctrine v11 numbers (749/14/163) and locked-at commit so claims stay honest.

recipes.title: Forecast a governance trajectory
recipes.summary: Run a PAC-Bayes governance trajectory forecast (Meridian) for a planned change.
